body_txt:
Tight sweaters are often worn by ladies as a form of Fanservice . A lot of the appeal is that they are Sexily Modest . A tight sweater is just Form-Fitting enough to outline the figure ("sweater puppies" is a nickname for a shapely chest ) while exposing almost nothing. That makes wearing one some of the most tasteful and acceptable fanservice around (not to mention one of the few actually acknowledged in mainstream fiction ). In the days of The Hays Code , once those sweaters caught on, they were almost up there with the heart-shaped neckline as a way of Getting Crap Past the Radar . Actresses who embraced this look were known as sweater girls , hence the trope name. This especially became a common form of fanservice for actresses who were playing wholesome, innocent characters that wouldn't be expected to wear revealing outfits. In the 1950s, when this trope was probably at its peak in cinema, the tight sweater was often paired with the cone bra or "bullet bra" for a couple of extra Fanservice points. (Check the page image to see the effect). Not that a tight sweater never is tacky. It's just if a gal wants to emphasize her chest, an angora sweater will let her do it with some class. A halter top is eye-catching, but this trope is "I'm sexy and I'm way out of your league". Particularly fuzzy sweaters can emphasize this by subtly echoing the glamour of a fur coat . A girl might put on a sweater just for warmth, and some women wear loose knits to conceal their figure rather than call attention to it. This is especially common in cultures where modesty is important.
But that is not this trope. To be a Sexy Sweater Girl, the character must wear her sweater in a way that obviously accentuates her upper body and/or catches the attention of the other characters. Everyday wear for the Seemingly Wholesome '50s Girl . The Dork in a Sweater may become Endearingly Dorky if that sweater fits particularly well, but if it doesn't, rest assured the fan artists will take care of that . Compare Fur Bikini , Happy Holidays Dress , Sexy Santa Dress , Homemade Sweater from Hell and Form-Fitting Wardrobe . noreallife
